a.xlink:title: The whole application: a first-person dungeon tavern with an NPC.
One placed thing in the world: its mesh, transform, collider, and any flame/NPC/door state.
Branching NPC dialogue driven by assets/dialogue/dialogues.json.
A single line the NPC says plus the choices offered after it.
One selectable option within a node.
One row of the wares table: a buyable/sellable good.
One light as uploaded to the GPU (std140-aligned).
First-person camera controller with mouse look, WASD movement, jumping, and collisions.
Splash / start menu shown over the live scene: Start, Controls, Quit.
Sampled lighting state for the current instant of the cycle.
